body: Good to hear from you, Kofi — it's been a few months since we crossed paths at the [Breakthrough Energy Fellows](orgs/breakthrough-energy-fellows) summit and I've been meaning to reconnect. I saw [Beacon Ventures](orgs/beacon-vc) made a couple of interesting moves in the distributed energy space last quarter, which tracks with some of what we were discussing over dinner about where the infrastructure gaps are widening. On our end at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), we've been heads-down on two new seed positions in grid-edge AI that I think you'd find compelling, and I'd love to get your read on the market dynamics we're seeing. Would you be open to a call sometime in the next two weeks? I'm generally free late mornings Pacific time.
